packageRules.description: Auto-merge everything except svelte-vitals/@svelte-vitals/core (those need a manually-added changeset, see the 'svelte-vitals' group below) and major updates (need review) — CI (build/test/lint, including the dist-freshness check) still has to pass first. The Renovate app is on main's ruleset bypass list specifically so these can merge without a human review.

engines.node is a deliberately chosen dev/pnpm compatibility floor (matches the main svelte-vitals repo's pnpm@11.x requirement) — never auto-bump it. The CI workflow's own node-version (a separate 'uses-with' dep) is unaffected and still updates normally.
Same maintainer, same trust boundary as this repo — the 3-day supply-chain wait below is for third-party deps, not our own just-published releases.
